attributes.action: Ban Non Stun Slaughter in England
attributes.additional_details:
To ban the barbaric act of non stun slaughter in England.
The British people and farmers do not want it.
It's animal torture.
attributes.background: To ban non stun slaughter in England due to animal welfare, as Scotland Wales and Northern Ireland have done

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Ban non-stun & recoverable stun slaughter of animals" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762116
